authorization_source: user explicitly authorized all already-local datasets and both workstation GPUs

dataset.name: VinDr-CXR-v1.0.0
dataset.selection: protocol_design positive rows; consolidation and pleural_effusion; one deterministic 3_of_3-preferred sample from area quartiles 1 and 4
dataset.analysis_unit: image_id because patient identifiers are not provided by the public release

execution_rule: prepare and hash-bind the four score-free expert masks first, then shard the frozen samples across cuda:0 and cuda:1; exclusions fail closed and are not repaired from scores
forbidden: threshold or operator tuning from outcomes
